∞ADVENTURES
THE CHRONICLES OF ASTERIA

A REALM BORN OF FALLEN STARS

Before kingdoms, before civilization, before even the oceans had names, the heavens shattered. Countless stars fell upon an empty world, and wherever one landed, life followed — mountains rose, forests bloomed, and the first people awakened beneath an endless sky of constellations. That world became known as Asteria.

✦

THE CELESTIALS

Silent beings said to watch over Asteria from beyond the heavens. They grant Astral Marks to those whose determination shines brighter than the night sky — blessings to some, trials to others. No one truly knows which.

NEXORIA

Beyond hidden gateways lies a forgotten land where Astral Essence flows fiercer than anywhere else in the world. Towering ruins, untamed beasts, and relics unlike any found in Asteria — many adventurers enter seeking fortune. Few are seen again.

THE PATH OF THE STARS

Six ancient titles, earned rather than inherited, recorded throughout Asteria's history:

  1. Wanderer
  2. Stargazer
  3. Celestial
  4. Nova
  5. Asteria
  6. Galaxy — the highest title ever recorded. Sound familiar?

No prophecy speaks your name. No Celestial has chosen your destiny. You're simply another traveler beneath the same stars — and in Asteria, history isn't inherited. It's written by those bold enough to leave their mark.

SERVER GUIDE

USEFUL COMMANDS

A quick cheat-sheet for everyday SMP life. Type any command into chat, swapping in your own names or amounts where shown.

✦

Shop

  • /shopOpens the item shop menu to buy and sell items
  • /sell handSells the item you're currently holding
  • /sell allSells every sellable item in your inventory at once

Getting Around

  • /spawnTeleports you back to the server spawn
  • /rtpRandomly teleports you to a fresh spot in the wild
  • /tpa <player>Requests to teleport to another player
  • /tpacceptAccepts an incoming teleport request

Homes

  • /sethome <name>Sets a home at your current location
  • /home <name>Teleports to one of your homes
  • /homesLists all the homes you've set
  • /delhome <name>Deletes one of your homes

Land Claims

  • /lands create <name>Claims the chunk you're standing in
  • /lands claimExtends your claim into the chunk you're facing
  • /lands trust <player>Lets another player build on your claim
  • /lands menuOpens your claim management menu

Economy & Trading

  • /balanceChecks how much money you have on hand
  • /pay <player> <amount>Sends money to another player
  • /ahOpens the auction house to browse or list items for sale

Banking

  • /bank create <name>Opens a bank account
  • /bank deposit <amount>Deposits money into your bank account
  • /bank withdraw <amount>Withdraws money from your bank account
  • /bank balanceChecks your bank account balance

Jobs

  • /jobs browseShows every job you can join
  • /jobs join <job>Joins a job so you start earning from it
  • /jobs leave <job>Leaves a job you've joined
  • /jobs statsShows your levels and progress in each job

Teams

  • /team create <name>Creates a new team
  • /team invite <player>Invites a player to your team
  • /team acceptAccepts a team invite
  • /team homeTeleports to your team's home

Everyday Basics

  • /msg <player> <message>Sends a private message to another player
  • /kitClaims any kits currently available to you
  • /warp <name>Teleports to a server warp point
  • /helpop <message>Sends a message straight to online staff

VOTE FOR ASTERIACRAFT

HOW IT WORKS

BUYING IS EASY

For now, every purchase is handled through a quick Discord ticket so we can set you up personally.

1

Pick what you want

Browse the Galaxy Rank or Cosmetic Packs tabs and note what you'd like to grab.

2

Hit "Buy on Discord"

Any buy button drops you straight into our server. No account or checkout needed here.

3

Open a ticket

Tell staff what you're after. We'll confirm the price and the payment options available to you.

4

Get set up in-game

Once sorted, hop on with play.asteriacraft.xyz and enjoy your new gear or rank.
